rulings.Case Title: DONALD W. DYE VS. CATERPILLAR EQUIPMENT,INC.,
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Advance Case For Trial
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFFS DONALD DYE, VALERIE DYE, WADE DYE, and VALARIE DYE'S Motion to Advance Case for Trial Off calendar in Dept. 501. Counsel should refile in Dept. 206. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing For Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 2. Hearing for Claimant BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S Motion To Disburse Surplus Proceeds DENY - failed to sustain burden, no evidence money was deposited with court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: D. BUCKLEY PROPERTIES INC., et al VS. PALOMA GAOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANTS PALOMA GAOS and ANDRES LOPEZ'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT Hearing required to address evidence on second prong. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to March 28, 2013. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6(b)&(c) no later than March 15, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEN SHIBAYAMA et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Leave To Intervene As A Party Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 4. INTERVENOR U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, as Trustee, on Behalf of the Certificate Holders of Harborview Mortgage Loan Trust 2005-3, Mortgage Loan Pass-Through Certificates, Series 2005-3 (hereinafter, "U.S. BANK")'S Motion for Leave to Intervene as a Party Defendant Continued to March 28, 2013. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.6(b)&(c) no later than March 15, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT JAN SAMZELIUS' (**Corrected** Notice of Motion) Motion To Stay the Instant Action Hearing required to address timeliness of this motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAY PROPERTY GROUP VS. JIAN SHENG FANG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT JIAN FANG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Grant, no opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIC-501 SECOND STREET LLC, VS. SUSAN CHONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 1, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANTS SUSAN CHONG AND HO CHONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled, 5 days to answer. Failed to sustain burden per CCP 430.10(e)&(f). = (501/REQ)
